channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Spain Logs Hottest April Since Records Began In 1961

media:content.media:description: The previous record was set in 2023 at 15C, the agency said

item.description: Spain logged its hottest April since records began in 1961 with an average temperature of 15.1C last month, national weather agency AEMET said.
item.content:encoded: Spain logged its hottest April since records began in 1961 with an average temperature of 15.1C last month, national weather agency AEMET said.

item.title: School Bullies To Face Caning Under New Guidelines In Singapore

media:content.media:description: Under the guidelines, offenders could face between one and three strokes of the cane. (Representational)

item.description: Caning was discussed in Singapore's parliament on Tuesday after legislators asked how it would be used in relation to bullying in schools.
item.content:encoded: Caning was discussed in Singapore's parliament on Tuesday after legislators asked how it would be used in relation to bullying in schools.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Does Quarantine On A Cruise Ship Minimise Disease Spread?

media:content.media:description: Quarantine on a cruise ship can help reduce hantavirus spread

item.description: Hantavirus is a rare virus carried by rodents, spread to humans through exposure to their urine, droppings, or saliva. Confirmed cases aboard an Atlantic cruise ship has raised alarm.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus is a rare virus carried by rodents, spread to humans through exposure to their urine, droppings, or saliva. Confirmed cases aboard an Atlantic cruise ship has raised alarm.

item.title: Barack Obama Reveals How Trump Presidency Has Created "Genuine Tension" In His Marriage To Michelle

media:content.media:description: Traditionally, former presidents avoid openly criticising their successors.

item.description: He noted that this pressure keeps him in the political arena, while Michelle desires a quieter, post-presidency life.
item.content:encoded: He noted that this pressure keeps him in the political arena, while Michelle desires a quieter, post-presidency life.

item.title: Los Angeles' Zohran Mamdani? Indian-Origin Nithya Raman Shakes Up Mayor Race

media:content.media:description: Raman entered the 2026 Los Angeles mayoral race just hours before the filing deadline

item.description: Nithya Raman became the first Asian American woman and the first South Asian to sit on the Los Angeles City Council.
item.content:encoded: Nithya Raman became the first Asian American woman and the first South Asian to sit on the Los Angeles City Council.

item.title: 'I Own You Brownie': Ex-JPMorgan Banker Refiles 'Sex Slave' Lawsuit Against Lorna Hajdini

media:content.media:description: Lawsuit against JPMorgan exec Lorna Hadjini refiled with new witness claims of sexual harassment.

item.description: JPMorgan banker refiles lawsuit alleging sexual abuse by executive Lorna Hadjini with new witness testimony.
item.content:encoded: JPMorgan banker refiles lawsuit alleging sexual abuse by executive Lorna Hadjini with new witness testimony.

item.title: Cruise Ship Hantavirus Outbreak: 2 Confirmed, 5 Suspected Cases On Board, Experts Warn There Is No Cure

media:content.media:description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard an Atlantic cruise ship has triggered global concern

item.description: A deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has raised urgent questions. Is there a cure? Experts explain current treatments, survival chances, and why early detection is critical in managing this rare but serious infection.
item.content:encoded: A deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has raised urgent questions. Is there a cure? Experts explain current treatments, survival chances, and why early detection is critical in managing this rare but serious infection.

item.title: Austrian Watchdog Files Complaint Against LinkedIn Over Paid Profile Views

media:content.media:description: Noyb said it was demanding LinkedIn be fined. (Representational)

item.description: A data protection group on Tuesday filed a complaint in Austria against professional networking platform LinkedIn, accusing it of charging users to see who has viewed their profiles.
item.content:encoded: A data protection group on Tuesday filed a complaint in Austria against professional networking platform LinkedIn, accusing it of charging users to see who has viewed their profiles.

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: "Stop Holding World Hostage," Germany Tells Iran After UAE Attacked

media:content.media:description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The US-Iran war broke out on February 28

item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.

item.title: Swastikas Spray Painted On New York's Jewish Homes, Synagogues: Police

media:content.media:description: The graffiti is the latest instance of antisemitic vandalism against the city's Jewish community.

item.description: A police spokeswoman confirmed that "multiple locations had swastikas drawn with spray paint" and that no arrests had been made.
item.content:encoded: A police spokeswoman confirmed that "multiple locations had swastikas drawn with spray paint" and that no arrests had been made.

item.title: US Flying Gas Station Goes Missing Over Qatar, Called 'Emergency' Moments Ago

media:content.media:description: In March, the US military lost a KC-135 in an Iranian attack in western Iraq.

item.description: The flight tracking data show the plane flew in a circular pattern in the air for a while, before it begun its descent for landing.
item.content:encoded: The flight tracking data show the plane flew in a circular pattern in the air for a while, before it begun its descent for landing.

item.title: 9 Killed In Explosion At Coal Mine In Colombia Due To Gas Buildup

media:content.media:description: Mining accidents in Colombia usually occur due to poor ventilation.

item.description: Monday's incident took place at a legally operated mine in the Sutatausa municipality, 45 miles (72 kilometers) north of the capital Bogota.
item.content:encoded: Monday's incident took place at a legally operated mine in the Sutatausa municipality, 45 miles (72 kilometers) north of the capital Bogota.

item.title: Ex-Model Accuses French Scout Of Grooming Her For Jeffrey Epstein

media:content.media:description: Epstein allegedly took Juliette's passport and held her 'hostage'.

item.description: Ex-French model's story comes as part of a wider reckoning with rape and sexual assault in the wake of the global MeToo movement in recent years.
item.content:encoded: Ex-French model's story comes as part of a wider reckoning with rape and sexual assault in the wake of the global MeToo movement in recent years.

item.title: $400 Million Ballroom To A 250-Foot Arch: Trump's Makeover Of White House

media:content.media:description: White House ballroom is estimated to cost $400 million.

item.description: Some of Trump's passion projects, have drawn criticism from Americans concerned about pocketbook issues and the preservation of historic landmarks.
item.content:encoded: Some of Trump's passion projects, have drawn criticism from Americans concerned about pocketbook issues and the preservation of historic landmarks.

item.title: US To Pakistan, How International Media Covered BJP's Victory In Bengal

media:content.media:description: In Pakistan, the Dawn carried the AFP report on the elections

item.description: From London to New York and Islamabad to Dhaka, publications also gave prominent space to Tamil superstar Joseph Vijay's surprise victory in Tamil Nadu.
item.content:encoded: From London to New York and Islamabad to Dhaka, publications also gave prominent space to Tamil superstar Joseph Vijay's surprise victory in Tamil Nadu.

item.title: Husband Accused Of Killing Former Miss Switzerland, Carving Out Her Womb Says He "Loved" Her

media:content.media:description: Her husband allegedly choked her first and then carved out her womb

item.description: The couple, who married in 2017, appeared to lead a "picture-perfect" life on social media.
item.content:encoded: The couple, who married in 2017, appeared to lead a "picture-perfect" life on social media.

item.title: "Humanitarian Effort": US Links Hormuz 'Freedom' To India's LPG Needs

media:content.media:description: Bessent acknowledged a shortfall of up to 10 million barrels per day due to the Hormuz crisis

item.description: The Treasury Secretary also criticised China, alleging Beijing was financially enabling Iran. "Iran is the largest state sponsor of terrorism, and China has been buying 90 per cent of their energy, so they are funding the largest state sponsor of ter
item.content:encoded: The Treasury Secretary also criticised China, alleging Beijing was financially enabling Iran. "Iran is the largest state sponsor of terrorism, and China has been buying 90 per cent of their energy, so they are funding the largest state sponsor of ter

item.title: "Unacceptable": PM Modi After Iran's Attack On UAE Port Injures 3 Indians

media:content.media:description: Fujairah oil industry zone also came under Iranian attack on March 14 (File Photo)

item.description: "Unacceptable": India As Iran's Attack On UAE's Fujairah Injures 3 Indians Amid Iran War
item.content:encoded: "Unacceptable": India As Iran's Attack On UAE's Fujairah Injures 3 Indians Amid Iran War

item.title: Intentional Fuel Cut-Off Caused 2022 China Plane Crash That Killed 132, Report Claims
item.description: US investigators were able to retrieve four voice recordings from the damaged cockpit recorder.
item.content:encoded: US investigators were able to retrieve four voice recordings from the damaged cockpit recorder.

item.title: Man Trapped On Cruise Shares Emotional Video On 'Hantavirus' Outbreak: "We're Not Just Headlines"
item.description: Three people, a Dutch couple and a German national, have died since April 11 on the cruise, which is operated by Oceanwide Expeditions.
item.content:encoded: Three people, a Dutch couple and a German national, have died since April 11 on the cruise, which is operated by Oceanwide Expeditions.
